channel.title: 其它 on sainnhe's blog
channel.description: Recent content in 其它 on sainnhe's blog

item.title: Contribution Guide for sainnhe/gruvbox-material-vscode
item.description: Requirements Make sure you have the following programs installed: git nodejs Start First of all, let’s try to package this extension and install it to your vscode. 1 2 3 4 5 $ git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/sainnhe/gruvbox-material-vscode.git $ cd gruvbox-material-vscode $ npm install $ npm run package $ code --install-extension ./gruvbox-material-6.2.1.vsix Now, use vscode to open this project and modify some code, then press F5 to start debugging. The

item.title: 在 GitHub Pages 上搭建个人博客
item.description: 创建 Github Pages 新建一个 GitHub 仓库，仓库名为 <username>.github.io，其中 <username> 是你的用户名（不是昵称）。 比如我的用户名是 &ld
